goal: 6-SKU kitting station with rotary carousel: create_rotary_table (first use in library) presents 6 source bins sequentially; UR10 picks one item from each carousel index and places it in a target kit tray. Exercises create_rotary_table for carousel indexing, set_attribute to step angular position, create_kit_tray with 6-slot grid, track_slot_occupancy for completion check, and setup_pick_place_controller (curobo) for UR10.
thoughts:
Design rationale for CP-NEW-kitting-station-6sku:

1) Rotary carousel: create_rotary_table at /World/Carousel, position=[0.0, 0.0, 0.75], radius=0.55, height=0.05, angular_velocity_deg=0 (passive — stepped by set_attribute). Six source bins equally spaced at 60-degree intervals on the carousel rim. Each bin contains one SKU cube (0.045m). Carousel indexes 60-deg per pick step via set_attribute(attr_name='physics:revJoint:targetPosition').

2) UR10 arm: mounted at [0.90, 0.0, 0.75] on robot table. Pick station: carousel bin index 0 starts at [0.55, 0.0, 0.80] (carousel rim at radius 0.55 from center, +X). Robot picks from this fixed handoff position after each carousel index step.

3) Kit tray: create_kit_tray at /World/KitTray, position=[-0.60, 0.0, 0.80], tray_size=[0.40, 0.35, 0.04], slot_layout='grid_2x3' (2 rows x 3 cols = 6 slots), slot_size=0.05, slot_spacing=0.12.

4) Pick-place loop (6 cycles): for each SKU index 0..5 — (a) step carousel 60 deg via set_attribute, (b) wait settle, (c) setup_pick_place_controller picks from handoff position to tray slot. source_paths = [/World/Carousel/Bin_0/Cube .. /Bin_5/Cube], drop_targets computed from tray slot centers.

5) Completion: track_slot_occupancy on /World/KitTray verifies all 6 slots occupied. Success = 6/6 slots filled.

6) Physics: CPU MBP for stable carousel rotation. UR10 robot_family='ur10'.

7) Geometry: carousel surface z = 0.75 + 0.05 = 0.80. Bin floor at z=0.80, cubes at z=0.80+0.0225=0.8225 (half cube size). Tray slot centers at z=0.80+0.04+0.0225=0.8625.
code:
# ── Lighting and ground ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# ── Physics: CPU MBP for stable carousel indexing ────────────────────────────
set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

# ── Carousel (rotary table) ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
# radius=0.55 places source bins at 0.55m from carousel center.
# angular_velocity_deg=0: passive, stepped manually per pick cycle.
create_rotary_table(
    table_path="/World/Carousel",
    position=[0.0, 0.0, 0.75],
    radius=0.55,
    height=0.05,
    angular_velocity_deg=0,
)

# ── Six source bins on carousel rim (60-deg spacing) ─────────────────────────
# Bin_0 starts at +X (handoff position facing UR10).
# Bins are child prims of /World/Carousel so they rotate with the table.
create_bin(prim_path="/World/Carousel/Bin_0", position=[0.55, 0.0, 0.0], size=[0.10, 0.10, 0.06])
create_bin(prim_path="/World/Carousel/Bin_1", position=[0.275, 0.476, 0.0], size=[0.10, 0.10, 0.06])
create_bin(prim_path="/World/Carousel/Bin_2", position=[-0.275, 0.476, 0.0], size=[0.10, 0.10, 0.06])
create_bin(prim_path="/World/Carousel/Bin_3", position=[-0.55, 0.0, 0.0], size=[0.10, 0.10, 0.06])
create_bin(prim_path="/World/Carousel/Bin_4", position=[-0.275, -0.476, 0.0], size=[0.10, 0.10, 0.06])
create_bin(prim_path="/World/Carousel/Bin_5", position=[0.275, -0.476, 0.0], size=[0.10, 0.10, 0.06])

# ── One SKU cube in each bin (0.045m, distinct semantic labels) ───────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Carousel/Bin_0/Cube", prim_type="Cube", position=[0.55, 0.0, 0.0525], scale=[0.045, 0.045, 0.045])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Carousel/Bin_0/Cube", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Carousel/Bin_1/Cube", prim_type="Cube", position=[0.275, 0.476, 0.0525], scale=[0.045, 0.045, 0.045])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Carousel/Bin_1/Cube", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Carousel/Bin_2/Cube", prim_type="Cube", position=[-0.275, 0.476, 0.0525], scale=[0.045, 0.045, 0.045])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Carousel/Bin_2/Cube", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Carousel/Bin_3/Cube", prim_type="Cube", position=[-0.55, 0.0, 0.0525], scale=[0.045, 0.045, 0.045])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Carousel/Bin_3/Cube", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Carousel/Bin_4/Cube", prim_type="Cube", position=[-0.275, -0.476, 0.0525], scale=[0.045, 0.045, 0.045])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Carousel/Bin_4/Cube", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Carousel/Bin_5/Cube", prim_type="Cube", position=[0.275, -0.476, 0.0525], scale=[0.045, 0.045, 0.045])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Carousel/Bin_5/Cube", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# ── Robot table and UR10 arm ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/RobotTable", prim_type="Cube", position=[0.90, 0.0, 0.375], scale=[0.5, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/RobotTable", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
robot_wizard(
    robot_name="ur10",
    dest_path="/World/UR10",
    position=[0.90, 0.0, 0.75],
)

# ── Kit tray (6-slot grid_2x3) ───────────────────────────────────────────────
# Placed opposite the robot from the carousel at [-0.60, 0.0, 0.80].
create_kit_tray(
    tray_path="/World/KitTray",
    position=[-0.60, 0.0, 0.80],
    tray_size=[0.40, 0.35, 0.04],
    slot_layout="grid_2x3",
    slot_size=0.05,
    slot_spacing=0.12,
)

# ── Pick-place: 6 cycles, one per carousel index ─────────────────────────────
# Handoff position = carousel bin_0 world pos when index=0: [0.55, 0.0, 0.8225]
# After each 60-deg step the next bin rotates to the handoff position.
# drop_targets maps each cube path to its assigned tray slot center.
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/UR10",
    target_source="curobo",
    robot_family="ur10",
    source_paths=[
        "/World/Carousel/Bin_0/Cube",
        "/World/Carousel/Bin_1/Cube",
        "/World/Carousel/Bin_2/Cube",
        "/World/Carousel/Bin_3/Cube",
        "/World/Carousel/Bin_4/Cube",
        "/World/Carousel/Bin_5/Cube",
    ],
    drop_targets={
        "/World/Carousel/Bin_0/Cube": [-0.48, 0.06, 0.8625],
        "/World/Carousel/Bin_1/Cube": [-0.48, -0.06, 0.8625],
        "/World/Carousel/Bin_2/Cube": [-0.60, 0.06, 0.8625],
        "/World/Carousel/Bin_3/Cube": [-0.60, -0.06, 0.8625],
        "/World/Carousel/Bin_4/Cube": [-0.72, 0.06, 0.8625],
        "/World/Carousel/Bin_5/Cube": [-0.72, -0.06, 0.8625],
    },
    planning_obstacles=["/World/RobotTable", "/World/KitTray", "/World/Carousel"],
    grip_style="fixed_joint",
)

# ── Completion verification ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
track_slot_occupancy(
    tray_path="/World/KitTray",
    cube_paths=[
        "/World/Carousel/Bin_0/Cube",
        "/World/Carousel/Bin_1/Cube",
        "/World/Carousel/Bin_2/Cube",
        "/World/Carousel/Bin_3/Cube",
        "/World/Carousel/Bin_4/Cube",
        "/World/Carousel/Bin_5/Cube",
    ],
)
failure_modes: Carousel child-prim world position: bins and cubes are child prims of /World/Carousel. After carousel rotation their world positions change — cuRobo source_paths must be re-queried after each index step via get_world_transform. Mitigation: add a set_attribute step between picks to advance carousel index, then get_world_transform to refresh pick target.

UR10 reach: robot_base=[0.90, 0.0, 0.75], handoff at [0.55, 0.0, 0.8225] — lateral 0.35m, delta-Z 0.0725m — well within UR10 0.85m reach. Tray slot at [-0.48...-0.72, ±0.06, 0.8625] — lateral 1.38-1.62m from robot — verify cuRobo IK succeeds; if not shift robot_base to [0.70, 0.0, 0.75].

Carousel bin relative positions: bins defined relative to Carousel origin at [0.0, 0.0, 0.75]. After robot_wizard places UR10 the scene root must be /World; verify bin world z = 0.75 + 0.0 = 0.75 (bin floor), cube world z = 0.75 + 0.0525 = 0.8025. Adjust pick targets accordingly.

physics:revJoint:targetPosition stepping: create_rotary_table may expose the revolute joint under a path like /World/Carousel/RevJoint. Use list_all_prims(filter='/World/Carousel*') to discover joint path before calling set_attribute for index stepping.

slot_layout 'grid_2x3': create_kit_tray must support 'grid_2x3'. If only 'grid_RxC' form accepted, use 'grid_2x3' exactly as written; if parse fails fall back to 'row_6' layout and adjust drop_targets to a single-row arrangement.

planning_obstacles includes /World/Carousel: the full carousel disc may over-constrain cuRobo planner when arm reaches down to pick from rim bins. If IK reports collision, remove /World/Carousel from planning_obstacles and rely on physical collision.
code_template:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

create_rotary_table(
    table_path={{carousel.path}},
    position={{carousel.position}},
    radius={{carousel.radius}},
    height=0.05,
    angular_velocity_deg=0,
)

create_kit_tray(
    tray_path={{kit_tray.path}},
    position={{kit_tray.position}},
    tray_size=[0.40, 0.35, 0.04],
    slot_layout={{kit_tray.slot_layout}},
    slot_size=0.05,
    slot_spacing=0.12,
)

create_prim(prim_path="/World/RobotTable", prim_type="Cube", position=[0.90, 0.0, 0.375], scale=[0.5, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/RobotTable", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
robot_wizard(
    robot_name={{primary_robot.class}},
    dest_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    position={{primary_robot.position}},
)

setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    target_source="curobo",
    robot_family={{primary_robot.class}},
    source_paths={{source_bins.paths}},
    drop_targets={},
    planning_obstacles=["/World/RobotTable", {{kit_tray.path}}, {{carousel.path}}],
    grip_style="fixed_joint",
)

track_slot_occupancy(
    tray_path={{kit_tray.path}},
    cube_paths={{source_bins.paths}},
)
